task_completion.description: Select the Einstein paper in the Zotero library
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero application, the item 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' should be highlighted/selected in the main middle pane, making its metadata visible in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Correct the Date field for the Einstein paper to 1905
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane for the Einstein paper, the 'Date' field must display '1905' (changed from '1095').

task_completion.description: Select the LeCun paper in the Zotero library
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero application, the item 'Deep Learning' should be highlighted/selected in the main middle pane, making its metadata visible in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Add the correct DOI to the LeCun paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane for the LeCun paper, the 'DOI' field must display '10.1038/nature14539'.

task_completion.description: Select the Turing paper in the Zotero library
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero application, the item 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' should be highlighted/selected in the main middle pane, making its metadata visible in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Correct the Publication field for the Turing paper to Mind
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane for the Turing paper, the 'Publication' field must display 'Mind' (changed from 'Mnd').

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Zotero application window being used to edit metadata, rather than a terminal running SQLite commands or a script editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor or terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: The expected values (1905, 10.1038/nature14539, Mind) must be entered specifically into the Zotero right-hand info pane fields, not written in a separate notepad or terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for signs of active UI interaction, such as highlighted rows in the Zotero list, active text cursors in the metadata fields, or standard Zotero interface elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified metadata targets: 1) Einstein's 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' Date must be '1905'. 2) LeCun's 'Deep Learning' DOI must be '10.1038/nature14539'. 3) Turing's 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' Publication must be 'Mind'.
